description.value:
No.JS: Declares reactive state. Value is a JS object literal.

```html
<div state="{ count: 0, name: 'World' }">
```

**Companions:** `persist`, `persist-key`, `persist-fields`, `persist-schema`

No.JS: Declares a named global store.

```html
<div store="cart" value="{ items: [], total: 0 }">
```

**Companion:** `value`

No.JS: Declares a computed property.

```html
<div computed="fullName" expr="firstName + ' ' + lastName">
```

**Companion:** `expr`

No.JS: Watches an expression for changes.

```html
<div watch="count" on:change="console.log($old, $new)">
```

**Companion:** `on:change`

No.JS: HTTP GET request.

```html
<div get="/api/users" as="users" loading="spinner-tpl">
```

**Companions:** `as`, `loading`, `error`, `empty`, `success`, `then`, `redirect`, `confirm`, `refresh`, `cached`, `body`, `headers`, `var`, `into`, `retry`, `retry-delay`, `params`, `debounce`

No.JS: HTTP POST request. Same companions as `get`.

```html
<form post="/api/users" body="{ name: name }" as="result">
```
No.JS: HTTP PUT request. Same companions as `get`.
No.JS: HTTP PATCH request. Same companions as `get`.
No.JS: HTTP DELETE request. Same companions as `get`.

No.JS: Binds element text content to a JS expression.

```html
<span bind="user.name">
```

No.JS: Binds element innerHTML to a JS expression.

```html
<div bind-html="richContent">
```

No.JS: Two-way data binding for form elements (INPUT, SELECT, TEXTAREA).

```html
<input model="username">
```

No.JS: Conditionally renders element. Removes from DOM when false. ```html
Welcome!
Please log in
``` **Companions:** `then`, `else`, `animate-enter`, `animate-leave`, `transition`, `animate-duration`

No.JS: Conditional branch after `if`. ```html
Admin panel
``` **Companion:** `then`

No.JS: Fallback branch after `if`/`else-if`. No value needed. **After conditional:** ```html
Welcome!
Please log in
``` **On loop elements** (`each`/`foreach`/`for`), `else="templateId"` is the empty-state companion — the referenced template (bare id or `#id`) renders when the list is empty, null/undefined, or not an array. A bare `else` with no preceding `if`/`else-if` sibling is invalid — No.JS logs a console warning. **Companion:** `then`

No.JS: Toggles element visibility via CSS `display`. Element stays in DOM. ```html
Visible content
``` **Companions:** `animate-enter`, `animate-leave`, `transition`, `animate-duration`

No.JS: Opposite of `show`. Hides element via CSS `display: none`. ```html
Content
``` **Companions:** `animate-enter`, `animate-leave`, `transition`, `animate-duration`

No.JS: Switch statement. Children use `case`, `default`, `then`. ```html

Admin panel

User dashboard

Guest view

```

No.JS: Self-repeating loop — the element with `each` IS the template that gets cloned for each item. Syntax: `"item in list"`. ```html
``` **Empty list fallback:** ```html
  • ``` The `else` template (bare id or `#id`) renders when the list is empty (`[]`) or null/undefined/not an array. Loop context: `$index`, `$count`, `$first`, `$last`, `$even`, `$odd` **Companions:** `template`, `else` (template ID), `key`, `animate-enter`, `animate-leave`, `animate-stagger`, `animate-duration`

No.JS: Primary self-repeating loop — the element with `foreach` IS the template that gets cloned for each item. Syntax: `"item in list"`. Aliases: `each`, `for`. **Self-repeating (recommended):** ```html
``` **Empty list fallback:** ```html
  • ``` The `else` template (bare id or `#id`) renders when the list is empty (`[]`) or null/undefined/not an array. **External template:** ```html
  • ``` Loop context: `$index`, `$count`, `$first`, `$last`, `$even`, `$odd` **Companions:** `index`, `else` (template ID), `filter`, `sort`, `limit`, `offset`, `template` (optional), `key`, animation attrs

No.JS: Alias of `foreach`. Self-repeating loop — the element with `for` IS the template that gets cloned for each item. Syntax: `"item in list"`. ```html
``` **Empty list fallback:** ```html
  • ``` The `else` template (bare id or `#id`) renders when the list is empty (`[]`) or null/undefined/not an array. Loop context: `$index`, `$count`, `$first`, `$last`, `$even`, `$odd` **Companions:** `index`, `else` (template ID), `filter`, `sort`, `limit`, `offset`, `template`, `key`, animation attrs

No.JS: Dispatches a custom event.

```html
<button on:click="count++" trigger="countChanged" trigger-data="count">
```

**Companion:** `trigger-data`

No.JS: Declares a reference to this element, accessible via `$refs`.

```html
<input ref="emailInput">
<!-- Access via $refs.emailInput -->
```
No.JS: Inserts a `

No.JS: HTTP call triggered by user action (e.g., button click).

```html
<button call="/api/delete/1" method="delete" confirm="Are you sure?" loading="spinner-tpl">
```

**Companions:** `method`, `as`, `loading`, `into`, `success`, `error`, `then`, `redirect`, `confirm`, `body`, `headers`

No.JS: Form validation with pristine-aware errors. **Requires `@erickxavier/nojs-elements` plugin since v1.13.0.**

```html
<form validate="" error-class="is-invalid" validate-on="input blur">
  <input name="email" validate="required|email" error-required="Email is required" />
</form>
```

Built-in validators: `required`, `email`, `url`, `min`, `max`, `custom`

**Companions:** `error`, `error-*`, `error-class`, `validate-on`, `validate-if`, `as`, `success`

No.JS: CSS class(es) applied to invalid fields after interaction. **Requires `@erickxavier/nojs-elements` plugin since v1.13.0.**

```html
<form validate="" error-class="is-invalid">
  <input name="email" validate="required" error-class="field-error" />
</form>
```

Can be set on the form (applies to all fields) or on individual fields.

No.JS: Validation trigger events (space-separated). **Requires `@erickxavier/nojs-elements` plugin since v1.13.0.**

```html
<form validate="" validate-on="input blur">
<input validate="required" validate-on="blur" />
```

**Values:** `input`, `blur`, `focusout`, `submit`

Defaults to `input focusout` if not specified.

No.JS: Conditional validation expression. Field is only validated when expression is truthy. **Requires `@erickxavier/nojs-elements` plugin since v1.13.0.**

```html
<input name="company" validate="required" validate-if="isBusinessAccount" />
```

No.JS: Wraps content with error handling. Value is the fallback template ID. ```html
...
```

No.JS: i18n translation. Value is the translation key.

```html
<span t="greeting" t-name="World">
```

**Companions:** `t-*` (interpolation params), `t-html`

No.JS: Sets i18n namespace for child elements. When used without a value on `route-view`, the namespace is auto-detected from the template name. ```html
```

No.JS: Makes element draggable. **Requires `@erickxavier/nojs-elements` plugin since v1.13.0.**

```html
<div drag="item" drag-type="card" drag-class="dragging">
```

**Companions:** `drag-type`, `drag-effect`, `drag-handle`, `drag-image`, `drag-image-offset`, `drag-disabled`, `drag-class`, `drag-ghost-class`, `drag-group`

No.JS: Makes element a drop target. **Requires `@erickxavier/nojs-elements` plugin since v1.13.0.**

```html
<div drop="items.push($drag)" drop-accept="card" drop-class="over">
```

**Companions:** `drop-accept`, `drop-effect`, `drop-class`, `drop-reject-class`, `drop-disabled`, `drop-max`, `drop-sort`, `drop-placeholder`, `drop-placeholder-class`

**Handler vars:** `$drag`, `$dragType`, `$dragEffect`, `$dropIndex`, `$source`, `$target`, `$el`

No.JS: Sortable list with drag and drop. **Requires `@erickxavier/nojs-elements` plugin since v1.13.0.**

```html
<ul drag-list="items" template="item-tpl" drag-type="card">
```

**Companions:** `template`, `drag-list-key`, `drag-list-item`, `drop-sort`, `drag-type`, `drop-accept`, `drag-list-copy`, `drag-list-remove`, and more

No.JS: Enables multi-select drag on `drag` elements. **Requires `@erickxavier/nojs-elements` plugin since v1.13.0.**

```html
<div drag="item" drag-multiple drag-group="cards">
```

**Companions:** `drag-group` (required), `drag-multiple-class`

No.JS: Sets the base URL for all descendant fetch directives (`get`, `post`, `put`, `patch`, `delete`, `call`). ```html
```

No.JS: Companion for `state`. Persists state to localStorage.

```html
<div state="{ count: 0 }" persist>
```

No.JS: Companion for `state`. Custom localStorage key.

```html
<div state="{ count: 0 }" persist persist-key="myState">
```

No.JS: Companion for `computed`. The expression to evaluate.

```html
<div computed="total" expr="price * quantity">
```

No.JS: Companion for HTTP directives (`get`, `post`, etc.) and `call`. Names the response data variable. Defaults to `"data"` for `call`.

```html
<div get="/api/users" as="users">
```

No.JS: Companion for HTTP directives and `call`. Template ID to show while loading.

```html
<div get="/api/data" as="data" loading="spinner-tpl">
```
No.JS: Companion for HTTP directives. Template ID to show when response is empty.
No.JS: Companion for HTTP directives and `call`. Template ID to show on success.

No.JS: Companion attribute. For HTTP directives: expression to run on success. For `if`/`else`/`else-if`: template ID to render.

```html
<div if="isAdmin" then="admin-panel">
<div get="/api" as="d" then="console.log(d)">
```
No.JS: Companion for HTTP directives, `call`, and router. Path to redirect to after success.

No.JS: Companion for HTTP directives and `call`. Shows confirmation dialog before executing.

```html
<button call="/api/delete/1" confirm="Are you sure?">
```

No.JS: Companion for HTTP directives. Auto-refresh interval in milliseconds.

```html
<div get="/api/notifications" as="notifs" refresh="30000">
```
No.JS: Companion for HTTP directives. Enables response caching.

No.JS: Companion for HTTP directives and `call`. Request body expression.

```html
<form post="/api/users" body="{ name: name, email: email }">
```

No.JS: Companion for HTTP directives and `call`. Custom request headers object.

```html
<div get="/api/data" headers="{ 'X-Custom': 'value' }">
<button call="/api/action" headers="{ 'Authorization': token }">
```
No.JS: Companion for HTTP directives. Variable name to store additional data.

No.JS: Companion for HTTP directives and `call`. Store name to put response data into.

```html
<button call="/api/cart" into="cart">
```

No.JS: Companion for HTTP directives. Number of retry attempts on failure.

```html
<div get="/api/data" retry="3" retry-delay="1000">
```
No.JS: Companion for HTTP directives. Delay between retries in milliseconds.

No.JS: Companion for HTTP directives. Query parameters object.

```html
<div get="/api/search" params="{ q: query, page: page }">
```
No.JS: Companion for HTTP directives. Debounce delay in milliseconds before making request.

**Deprecated.** No.JS: Companion for `foreach`. Use `"item in list"` syntax instead.

```html
<!-- Deprecated -->
<li foreach="item" from="items">

<!-- Use instead -->
<li foreach="item in items">
```

Core emits a console warning when `from` is used.

No.JS: Companion for `foreach`. Custom name for the index variable.

```html
<li foreach="item" from="items" index="i">
```
No.JS: Companion for `foreach`. Filter expression for list items.
No.JS: Companion for `foreach`. Property name to sort by.
No.JS: Companion for `foreach`. Maximum number of items to display.
No.JS: Companion for `foreach`. Number of items to skip.

No.JS: Companion for `each`, `foreach`, `drag-list`. Template ID to use for rendering items.

```html
<ul each="item in items" template="item-tpl">
```

No.JS: Companion for `each`. Expression for unique item key to optimize DOM updates.

```html
<li each="user in users" key="user.id">
```

No.JS: Companion for `call`. HTTP method to use.

```html
<button call="/api/item/1" method="delete">
```

No.JS: Companion for `trigger`. Expression for event detail data.

```html
<button trigger="notify" trigger-data="{ message: 'Hello' }">
```

No.JS: Child attribute for `switch`. Value to match against. ```html

Active

```

No.JS: Child attribute for `switch`. Fallback when no `case` matches. ```html

Unknown status

```

No.JS: Companion for `t`. Renders the translation value as sanitized HTML (via `_sanitizeHtml()`) instead of plain text. ```html
```

No.JS: Animation name for element enter/appear.

```html
<div if="show" animate="fadeIn">
```

No.JS: Animation name for element entering (alias for `animate`).

```html
<div if="show" animate-enter="fadeIn" animate-leave="fadeOut">
```

No.JS: Animation name for element leaving.

```html
<div if="show" animate-leave="fadeOut">
```

No.JS: Animation duration in milliseconds.

```html
<div if="show" animate="fadeIn" animate-duration="500">
```

No.JS: Incremental delay between animated list items in milliseconds.

```html
<li each="item in items" animate="fadeInUp" animate-stagger="50">
```

No.JS: CSS transition name. Uses class convention: `{name}-enter`, `{name}-enter-active`, `{name}-enter-to`, `{name}-leave`, `{name}-leave-active`, `{name}-leave-to`.

```html
<div if="show" transition="fade">
```

No.JS: Router outlet container. Renders matched route templates.

```html
<div route-view src="./pages/" transition="fade">
```
No.JS: Route path declaration on `
No.JS: CSS class applied when element's route is active. ```html Home ```
No.JS: CSS class applied only on exact route match. ```html Home ```
No.JS: Index page name for `route-view`. Default: `"index"`.

No.JS: Named outlet for `<template>`. Default: `"default"`.

```html
<template route="/dashboard" outlet="sidebar">...</template>
```

No.JS: Route guard expression. Evaluated before entering route.

```html
<template route="/admin" guard="isAuthenticated">
```

No.JS: Template source URL for `route-view` or `<template>`.

```html
<div route-view src="./pages/">
<template src="./components/header.tpl">
```
No.JS: File extension for `route-view` templates. Default from config.

No.JS: Loading strategy for templates.

```html
<template src="./heavy.tpl" lazy="ondemand">
```
No.JS: Type identifier for the dragged item. Used with `drop-accept` for filtering. Requires `@erickxavier/nojs-elements` plugin.
No.JS: Drag effect cursor indicator. Requires `@erickxavier/nojs-elements` plugin.

No.JS: CSS selector for the drag handle element. Requires `@erickxavier/nojs-elements` plugin.

```html
<div drag="item" drag-handle=".handle">
```
No.JS: CSS selector for custom drag image element. Requires `@erickxavier/nojs-elements` plugin.
No.JS: Offset for custom drag image as `"x,y"`. Requires `@erickxavier/nojs-elements` plugin.
No.JS: Expression to disable dragging conditionally. Requires `@erickxavier/nojs-elements` plugin.
No.JS: CSS class applied to element while being dragged. Requires `@erickxavier/nojs-elements` plugin.
No.JS: CSS class applied to the ghost element left behind while dragging. Requires `@erickxavier/nojs-elements` plugin.
No.JS: Group name for `drag-multiple` multi-selection. Requires `@erickxavier/nojs-elements` plugin.
No.JS: CSS class applied to multi-selected drag items. Requires `@erickxavier/nojs-elements` plugin.

No.JS: Comma-separated list of accepted `drag-type` values. Requires `@erickxavier/nojs-elements` plugin.

```html
<div drop="handleDrop()" drop-accept="card,task">
```
No.JS: Drop effect cursor indicator. Requires `@erickxavier/nojs-elements` plugin.
No.JS: CSS class applied when a valid drag item is over the drop target. Requires `@erickxavier/nojs-elements` plugin.
No.JS: CSS class applied when an invalid drag item is over the drop target. Requires `@erickxavier/nojs-elements` plugin.
No.JS: Expression to disable dropping conditionally. Requires `@erickxavier/nojs-elements` plugin.
No.JS: Maximum number of items the drop target accepts. Requires `@erickxavier/nojs-elements` plugin.
No.JS: Sort direction for drop targets. Value: `"vertical"` (default), `"horizontal"`, or `"grid"`. Requires `@erickxavier/nojs-elements` plugin.
No.JS: HTML string or tag name for the placeholder element shown during drag. Requires `@erickxavier/nojs-elements` plugin.
No.JS: CSS class for the drop placeholder element. Requires `@erickxavier/nojs-elements` plugin.
No.JS: Unique key property for `drag-list` items. Requires `@erickxavier/nojs-elements` plugin.
No.JS: Variable name for current item in `drag-list` template. Requires `@erickxavier/nojs-elements` plugin.
No.JS: Copy items instead of moving when dragging from this `drag-list`. Requires `@erickxavier/nojs-elements` plugin.
No.JS: Remove items from source list after dragging. Requires `@erickxavier/nojs-elements` plugin.
No.JS: CSS class applied during the settle animation after a drop in `drag-list`.
No.JS: CSS class applied to `drag-list` when it has no items.

No.JS: Companion for `store`. Initial store data as a JS object literal.

```html
<div store="cart" value="{ items: [], total: 0 }">
```
No.JS: Companion for HTTP directives. Template ID shown on error, or template ID for `call` error handling.
No.JS: Synchronously clones an inline template into the current position. Used on `

No.JS: Companion for `state` + `persist`. Comma-separated list of fields to persist selectively. Unlisted fields use their initial values on page load.

```html
<div state="{ theme: 'dark', sidebar: true, tempData: null }"
     persist="localStorage"
     persist-key="prefs"
     persist-fields="theme,sidebar">
```

No.JS: Reactively sets the document ``. Place on a `<div hidden>` element. ```html <div hidden page-title="product.name + ' | My Store'"></div> <div hidden page-title="'About Us | My Store'"></div> ``` Watches the expression and updates `<title>` whenever the reactive context changes.

No.JS: Reactively sets `` in ``. Creates the tag if it doesn't exist. ```html
``` Watches the expression and updates the meta content whenever the reactive context changes.

No.JS: Reactively sets `` in ``. Creates the tag if it doesn't exist. ```html
``` Watches the expression and updates the canonical URL whenever the reactive context changes.
No.JS: Reactively sets `

No.JS: Controls when the GET request fires for pagination. Companion for `get`.

```html
<div get="/api/items" as="items" get-trigger="scroll">
```

**Values:** `load`, `visible`, `hover`, `none`, `scroll`, `button`

No.JS: Label text for the auto-generated Load More button when `get-trigger="button"`. Companion for `get`.

```html
<div get="/api/items" as="items" get-trigger="button" get-trigger-label="Show More">
```

Default: `"Load More"`

No.JS: How fetched content is inserted into the container during pagination. Companion for `get`.

```html
<div get="/api/items" as="items" get-trigger="scroll" get-insert="append">
```

**Values:** `append`, `prepend`

No.JS: Initial page number for offset-based pagination (auto-increments on each fetch). Companion for `get`. Mutually exclusive with `get-cursor`.

```html
<div get="/api/items?page={$page}" as="items" get-page="1" get-trigger="scroll">
```

No.JS: Enables cursor-based pagination. Companion for `get`. Mutually exclusive with `get-page`.

```html
<div get="/api/items" as="items" get-cursor get-cursor-field="meta.nextCursor" get-trigger="scroll">
```

No.JS: Dot-notation path to the cursor value in the JSON response. Companion for `get` + `get-cursor`.

```html
<div get="/api/items" as="items" get-cursor get-cursor-field="meta.nextCursor">
```

If omitted, the framework auto-detects the cursor from the response.

No.JS: IntersectionObserver `rootMargin` for `scroll`/`visible` triggers. Companion for `get`.

```html
<div get="/api/items" as="items" get-trigger="scroll" get-threshold="200px">
```

Default: `200px` for scroll trigger, `0px` for visible trigger.

No.JS: ID (without `#`) of a DOM element to hide while loading and restore on response. Prevents CLS — element must start visible in HTML. Companion for `get`. ```html
Loading...

```

values.name: fadeInUp
values.description: No.JS: Fade in while sliding up

values.name: fadeInDown
values.description: No.JS: Fade in while sliding down

values.name: fadeOutUp
values.description: No.JS: Fade out while sliding up

values.name: fadeOutDown
values.description: No.JS: Fade out while sliding down

values.name: slideInLeft
values.description: No.JS: Slide in from the left

values.name: slideInRight
values.description: No.JS: Slide in from the right

values.name: slideOutLeft
values.description: No.JS: Slide out to the left

values.name: slideOutRight
values.description: No.JS: Slide out to the right

values.name: bounceIn
values.description: No.JS: Bounce in with elastic effect

values.name: bounceOut
values.description: No.JS: Bounce out with elastic effect

values.name: link
values.description: No.JS: Link to the dragged item

values.name: visible
values.description: No.JS: Fetch when element becomes visible

values.name: scroll
values.description: No.JS: Fetch when scrolled near (infinite scroll)

values.name: button
values.description: No.JS: Fetch on Load More button click

values.name: append
values.description: No.JS: Append new items after existing content

values.name: prepend
values.description: No.JS: Prepend new items before existing content
